query:
SELECT 'chat_messages' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM chat_messages
UNION ALL SELECT 'receipts', COUNT(*) FROM receipts
UNION ALL SELECT 'transactions', COUNT(*) FROM transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'notary_sessions', COUNT(*) FROM notary_sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'remote_returns', COUNT(*) FROM remote_returns
UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_items', COUNT(*) FROM audit_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'promo_codes', COUNT(*) FROM promo_codes
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users;
